backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that exposes a single `getAppInfo` function returning the app name ('Image and PDF Compressor'), version ('1.0.0'), and an empty icon blob.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs (multimedia app layout, MP3 Cutter, Video Cutter, etc.) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary of short summaries for each frontend source file, describing the purpose and notable changes of each module, hook, and component in the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, card, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app, setting the page title to 'All-in-One Conversion Tool App' and mounting the app via `/src/main.tsx`.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the app in ThemeProvider, renders the main tabbed layout (5 tools), and conditionally switches to MultimediaApp when the Multimedia button is clicked.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying the copyright year, a local-processing notice, and a branded link to caffeine.ai using the current hostname as a UTM parameter.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: App header with logo, title, a connection status badge, a Multimedia Studio navigation button, and a dark/light theme toggle.
frontend/src/components/TabNavigation.ts: Horizontal scrollable tab bar rendering five tool tabs (Image Editor, PDF Converter, Image Converter, Passport Photo, BG Remover) with active highlighting and description text.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports a `useAppInfo` hook that fetches application info from the backend actor using React Query, enabled only when the actor is ready.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind, and defines CSS custom properties for light/dark theme tokens including colors, sidebar, and chart variables, plus reusable component utility classes.
frontend/src/lib/jszip.ts: Utility module that lazily loads JSZip from CDN and exposes helpers to create ZIP archives from file entries and trigger browser downloads, plus a data-URL-to-Blob converter.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with React Query and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/modules/BackgroundRemover.t: Main background remover UI component that orchestrates canvas-based image display, brush painting, crop overlay, and delegates logic to the `useBackgroundRemover` hook and sub-panel components.
frontend/src/modules/BackgroundRemover/B: Interactive before/after image comparison component with a draggable slider that reveals the original versus the processed result side by side.
React component that renders a brush tool panel for painting/erasing mask areas, including mode toggles, a brush size slider with live preview circle, and undo/clear/erase action buttons.
frontend/src/modules/BackgroundRemover/C: React component that renders an interactive crop overlay with draggable corner, edge, and move handles, converting between display and image coordinate spaces for mouse and touch events.
frontend/src/modules/BackgroundRemover/E: React component providing export controls for the background remover, supporting PNG/JPG download, ZIP export, zoom controls, reset, and adding a background image.
frontend/src/modules/BackgroundRemover/R: React component that renders the background removal control panel, including auto-detect, output mode selection (transparent or custom color), a color picker, and the remove background action button.
frontend/src/modules/BackgroundRemover/u: Custom React hook that manages all state and logic for the background remover tool, including image loading, canvas drawing, mask painting with undo history, crop, zoom, rotation, and background removal processing.
frontend/src/modules/ImageConverter.tsx: Main ImageConverter component that composes the multi-step tabbed UI (upload, settings, preview, export) using the useImageConversion hook and sub-components. Also defines local PreviewImage and ThumbnailItem helper components with loading/error states.
frontend/src/modules/ImageConverter/Batc: Drag-and-drop/file-input panel for uploading multiple images, displaying a thumbnail grid with remove buttons and a Next navigation button.
frontend/src/modules/ImageConverter/Befo: Interactive before/after slider component that overlays the original and converted images side-by-side, supporting mouse and touch dragging to reveal each side.
frontend/src/modules/ImageConverter/Conv: Settings panel for configuring output format, quality, resize mode (dimensions or percentage), aspect ratio lock, and image filters, with Back/Next navigation buttons.
frontend/src/modules/ImageConverter/Expo: Export panel that triggers batch image conversion, shows a progress bar, lists converted results with per-image download buttons, and offers a ZIP download for all images.
frontend/src/modules/ImageConverter/useI: Custom hook that manages image state, conversion settings, and conversion logic using the Canvas API (with filter application and resize modes), plus ZIP download via jszip.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor.tsx: Main ImageEditor component that orchestrates the canvas, toolbar, panels, and overlays for image editing, including crop, text placement, zoom, undo/redo, export, and ZIP download functionality.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/Adjustm: Sidebar panel with sliders for adjusting image brightness, contrast, and saturation, plus a reset button to restore defaults.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/CropOve: Interactive canvas overlay component that renders a draggable/resizable crop rectangle with corner and edge handles, emitting apply or cancel events with the final crop coordinates.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/CropToo: Sidebar panel for cropping that provides a button to start interactive crop mode and quick aspect-ratio preset buttons (1:1, 4:3, 16:9, etc.).
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/ExportD: Modal dialog for exporting the edited image, allowing the user to choose format (JPEG, PNG, WebP) and quality, then triggering a download.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/FilterP: Grid of filter preset buttons (Vintage, B&W, HDR, etc.) that apply CSS-style filter values to the image state.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/ImageUp: Upload panel with drag-and-drop and file-input support that reads an image file and passes its data URL to the parent via a callback.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/ResizeT: Sidebar panel with width/height inputs and an optional aspect-ratio lock for resizing the image, applying the new dimensions on button click.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/TextLay: Renders an interactive overlay div for dragging and rotating text layers on the image canvas, handling mouse events for move and rotate modes with coordinate scaling.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/TextOve: Provides the sidebar UI panel for configuring and adding text layers, including controls for font, color, size, background, shadow, and placement (center or click-to-place).
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/Transfo: Renders a simple toolbar with buttons to rotate the image by 90° or 180° and toggle horizontal/vertical flipping.
frontend/src/modules/ImageEditor/useImag: Custom hook that manages image editing state (brightness, contrast, rotation, filters, crop, text layers) and exposes canvas rendering, undo/redo, and layer manipulation functions.
frontend/src/modules/IPCamera.tsx: React component that activates the device camera, detects the local IP address via WebRTC, and displays a live preview along with a copyable URL for IP camera sharing.
frontend/src/modules/MP3Cutter.tsx: Audio trimming tool that decodes an uploaded MP3, renders an interactive waveform canvas with draggable start/end handles, and exports the selected audio segment.
frontend/src/modules/PassportPhotoConver: Top-level React component for the Passport Photo Converter feature, handling file upload/drop, preset selection, and composing the grid, text customization, and export sub-panels.
React component that renders multiple copies of a processed passport photo onto an A4-sized canvas at 300 DPI, with optional per-photo text labels including background and shadow styling.
React component providing export controls for the passport photo A4 canvas, supporting PNG, GIF, and PDF download formats as well as browser print and ZIP archive of individual photos.
React panel component for configuring text overlay on passport photos, including controls for font, size, color, bold/italic, alignment, background, and shadow settings.
Custom React hook managing passport photo state and processing logic, including size presets, text overlay config, image enhancement (sharpening/contrast), and export format handling.
frontend/src/modules/PDFConverter.tsx: Top-level PDF tool component with tabbed navigation for PDF scanning, file management, merge/split, and create-from-images workflows, delegating each tab to a dedicated sub-component.
frontend/src/modules/PDFConverter/Conver: Renders a list of loaded PDF/image files with their sizes and a 'Convert & Download PDF' button that triggers the merge/convert operation. Shows a loading spinner during conversion and a summary count of files to be merged.
frontend/src/modules/PDFConverter/Create: Standalone component that lets users upload images via drag-and-drop or file input, then uses pdf-lib (loaded dynamically from CDN) to embed each image as a page and download the resulting PDF.
frontend/src/modules/PDFConverter/MergeS: Provides a drag-reorderable, selectable list of PDF entries with add/remove/clear controls and a merge-and-download action that can operate on all or only selected files.
frontend/src/modules/PDFConverter/PageMa: React component that lets users select a PDF file, renders page thumbnails via PDF.js loaded from CDN, and supports selecting/removing pages with drag-and-drop reordering.
frontend/src/modules/PDFConverter/PDFFil: Displays an interactive list of added PDF and image files with select-all/individual checkboxes, file removal, and a convert button that passes selected or all file IDs to the parent's createPDF handler.
frontend/src/modules/PDFConverter/PDFSca: Implements a document-scanner UI that applies brightness, contrast, and binarization adjustments to uploaded images and includes an interactive crop overlay with corner-drag handles and auto edge-detection.
frontend/src/modules/PDFConverter/PDFUpl: Drag-and-drop upload zone restricted to PDF files that displays a list of loaded PDFs with name, size, and individual remove buttons, delegating file handling to parent callbacks.
frontend/src/modules/PDFConverter/usePDF: Custom React hook that manages PDF and image file state, providing operations for adding/removing files, generating thumbnails via PDF.js, merging pages with pdf-lib, and downloading results.
frontend/src/modules/VideoCutter.tsx: React component for trimming video files in-browser using FFmpeg (loaded from CDN), with a draggable timeline UI for selecting start/end cut points and downloading the result.
frontend/src/modules/VideoDownloader.tsx: React component that fetches YouTube or Facebook video metadata via the YouTube Data API and presents quality-selection options, redirecting users to the watch URL for download.
frontend/src/modules/VideoDownloaderMult: Simplified YouTube-only video downloader component that fetches video metadata via the YouTube API and opens the watch URL in a new tab as a download fallback.
frontend/src/MultimediaApp.tsx: Standalone Multimedia Studio app with a sticky header (dark/light toggle, back button), horizontal tab navigation for MP3 Cutter, Video Cutter, Video Downloader, and IP Camera, and animated tab content switching.
frontend/src/types/declarations.d.ts: TypeScript module declarations providing type definitions for CDN-loaded libraries: pdf-lib, pdfjs-dist, and jszip.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Inter, Space Grotesk), oklch-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations. Includes plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Persistent project state document (version 61) describing the all-in-one conversion tool app's modules, architectural decisions, known issues, and a detailed list of existing implemented features for both the main conversion app and the multimedia app.
